title: 3 longtime tenants to close or move after Alpha Management buys prominent Allston commercial building
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Alpha Management purchased a building on Harvard Ave., Allston for $12.25 million, prompting rent increases for tenants.
Three longtime Allston businesses, including Regeneration Tattoo and Ritual Arts, announced closures or relocations due to higher rents.
Alpha Management plans renovations and aims to reposition the property to strengthen the retail corridor on Harvard Avenue.

title: Paul Pierce, Kevin Garnett to introduce Doc Rivers at Hall of Fame ceremony
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Doc Rivers to be inducted into the Naismith Basketball Hall of Fame as a coach on August 15.
Celtics legends Paul Pierce and Kevin Garnett chosen to present Rivers at the Springfield ceremony.
Rivers ranks sixth in NBA all-time coaching wins with 1,194 and is the second-winningest Celtics coach.

title: Jayson Tatum says it’s ‘weird’ that Jaylen Brown is no longer a Celtic
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Celtics' Jayson Tatum feels 'weird' about playing against former teammate Jaylen Brown, now with 76ers.
Jaylen Brown traded to Philadelphia 76ers, Celtics received Paul George, two first-round and second-round picks.
Celtics fans react emotionally to Brown's trade; young fan's viral reaction led to meeting with Brown.

title: How many first-round picks would Drake Maye be worth?
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Drake Maye, at age 23, has been to a Super Bowl and received two Pro Bowl selections.
ESPN's Bill Barnwell estimates Maye's trade value at six first-round picks, compared to seven for Mahomes and Allen.
Historical NFL trades for quarterbacks include Deshaun Watson for three first-round picks and Brett Favre for one.

title: Furnished island home on Lake Winnipesaukee — can you guess the price?
author: Emily Turner
bullets: Furnished island home on Lake Winnipesaukee listed at $889,500.
The Gilford, N.H., cottage built in 1952 includes 1,037 square feet, three bedrooms, and a full bath.
Property features a private deck with direct access to the lake, offering short-term rental potential.

title: ‘The Odyssey’ review: Christopher Nolan defies the odds (and the gods) with a spectacular retelling of Homer’s epic
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, focusing on his humanity rather than divine legends.
The film utilizes a non-linear narrative and features stunning IMAX scenes with practical effects and epic set pieces.
Nolan's adaptation highlights Odysseus' fallibility, drawing parallels with his past works using themes of time and human suffering.

title: Red Sox pitcher Payton Tolle just got married and celebrated at this North End restaurant
author: John Waller
bullets: Red Sox pitcher Payton Tolle married his partner, Devin, during the All-Star break.
The couple celebrated their wedding at Arya Trattoria in Boston's North End.
Tolle, a 23-year-old from Oklahoma, was drafted by the Red Sox in 2024.

title: Patriots 2026 position preview: Defensive Line edition
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Milton Williams and Christian Barmore lead the Patriots' defensive line, recording a combined 86 pressures last season.
The Patriots allowed 101.7 rushing yards per game in 2025, ranking sixth in the NFL, showing strong run defense improvement.
The team lacks edge depth, especially with Harold Landry's recent knee issues and the departure of Khyiris Tonga.

title: 28-year-old killed in Mass. skydiving accident was a Northeastern grad
author: John Waller
bullets: Mani Chandra Teja Gaddam died in a skydiving accident in Orange, Massachusetts due to an unexpected gust of wind.
The 28-year-old, a Northeastern University grad, fell approximately 30 feet and was pronounced dead at Athol Hospital.
Gaddam, a recent skydiving licensee, had moved to Boston for his master's in computer science from India.

title: Is the real summer turnaround in Boston sports coming from Legacy FC?
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Legacy FC achieved their first road win in history with a 1-0 victory over Orlando Pride.
The team has recovered from an initial 0-5 start to be in contention for the NWSL playoffs.
Legacy FC will face second-place Washington Spirit at Centreville Bank Stadium on Sunday.
